scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:docs && npm run build:examples
scripts.build:lib: npm run build -w @girk/utils && npm run build -w girk
scripts.build:examples: npm run build -w @girk/example-basic && npm run build -w @girk/example-multilang
scripts.test: npm run test -w @girk/utils && npm run test -w girk
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:lib && npm run build:docs && playwright test
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:examples && npm run test:e2e
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @girk/utils && npm run lint -w girk
scripts.fmt: npm run fmt -w @girk/utils && npm run fmt -w girk
scripts.fmt:check: npm run fmt:check -w @girk/utils && npm run fmt:check -w girk
